name: OpenAgent — Hybrid AI
desc: A next-gen AI assistant combining cloud intelligence (Groq Llama 3.3 70B) with local privacy (Ollama Phi-3). Features web search, file parsing, OCR vision, RAG memory, and a cyberpunk UI.

name: Travel GO-INDIA
desc: Discover the vibrant tapestry of India through an immersive travel experience website.

name: Android Cipher
desc: A cipher code generator and decrypter using blowfish algorithm compatible with any versions of Android and iOS operating system.

name: Dynamic Showcase
desc: Next-level responsive portfolio using gyroscopic movement tracking system with React/JS, SCSS, CSS.

name: Focus Guard
desc: A sophisticated system designed to detect distraction using face algorithm with real-time AI & ML.

name: Alarm Clock App
desc: A vintage-themed alarm clock app built using Kotlin, Java, SDK, Gradle, XML & JDK supporting Android and iOS.

name: To-Do List App
desc: A task management application built using Kotlin, Java, SDK, Gradle, JDK, XML supporting Android and iOS.

name: Visiting Profile
desc: An interactive digital visiting card web application built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript.

name: Smart City Waste Management
desc: A smart city waste management system with AI assistant using route optimisation — developed in a 24-hour hackathon.

name: Cyber Calculator
desc: A sleek, cyberpunk-themed calculator built with JavaScript, CSS and SCSS.
